SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERLO, DAVID DBA M & S MARBLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZOCCA, GIOVANNI DBA TRATTORIA PINOCCHIO $2,323.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,373.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS)
